records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when INDES, FESADES, or a recognised horse-racing operator publishes a stable current meeting calendar.
records.blocked_reason: The reviewed official material concerns equestrian sport and does not establish a current horse-racing calendar.
limitations: Equestrian clinics and jumping competition are not horse-racing fixtures.
No current date-and-racecourse row is approved.
No racing authority or recurring racecourse calendar was verified.
records.notes: Use explanatory treatment only and keep equestrian sport separate from horse racing.
